title: Malingering
content:
Malingering,
    increase drift
    of censure
    infrared blotted one.


    No noise, just
    the splashing of the sea
    endless, shrill
    birds
    gaping a way
    into the night's chill.
meaning:
Paul Cameron Brown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Malingering"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
